name: Hmc Capital Limited
analysis: HMC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.0900, stop A$2.7522, target A$4.0284 (2.78:1) — then trail it.
